layout_strategy.grid_system: Use st.columns for high-density horizontal stacking.
layout_strategy.grouping: Wrap related fields in visual 'Cards' using CSS containers.
layout_strategy.spacing: Compact vertical spacing (gap-4 or gap-6 in Tailwind terms).

form_card.properties: background: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #E2E8F0; border-radius: 8px; padding: 16px; margin-bottom: 16px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);

form_header.properties: font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; color: #64748B; letter-spacing: 0.05em; margin-bottom: 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid #F1F5F9; padding-bottom: 8px;

submit_btn.properties: width: 100%; background-color: #1D4ED8; color: white; font-weight: 600; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border-radius: 6px;

implementation_steps.description: Add a function to inject the specific CSS for the form layout.

instructions: Call inject_add_stock_form_css() at the beginning of the block.
Remove the 'Novo Proprietário' button from its current position and place it strategically (or keep it but styled).

Create 4 visual sections using st.markdown('
', unsafe_allow_html=True) ... st.markdown('
', unsafe_allow_html=True).
Inside each card, use st.columns to arrange fields side-by-side.
Section 1 (Identity): Col 1 (Garanhão - 100%), Col 2 (Proprietário - 100%). OR Row 1: Garanhão (2/3), Proprietário (1/3).
Section 2 (Technical): 3 Columns. Col 1: Motilidade, Concentração. Col 2: Qualidade, Cor. Col 3: Certificado.
Section 3 (Production): 4 Columns. Data, Palhetas, Dose, Origem.
Ensure all inputs use 'width=stretch' if available or rely on column width.
Add a submit button at the end, outside the cards but inside the form.

universal_guidelines: Use uppercase, small, bold headers for sections.
